tool.why: wire shows tool-output-available AND the reply carries a token only a real shell could emit

approve.why: approved: the gated command executed after approval (outcome=available, paused finish=other: True)

deny.why: denied: the gated command never executed (outcome=error)

turn_resumed.reply: The command was not run — permission was denied.
